content.en:
Subsequently, under the explanation of the Lord of Xuanhuang, Ye Tian finally learned the specific situation of the Extreme Gold Liquid.

After becoming the number one on the Blood Battle List, as long as you persist in a thousand eternal years, you can enter the top of Zhendao Mountain and enter a place called the Extreme Gold River, where every once in a while a drop of Extreme Gold Liquid will be born.

The Extreme Gold Liquid cannot be brought out of the Extreme Gold River, it must be refined in the Extreme Gold River immediately, and because the time of the Extreme Gold Liquid is uncertain, the first place on the Blood Battle List must always wait in the Golden River of Extreme Creation.

However, once you fall out of the first place in the blood battle list, you must come out of the river of Extreme Perfection, and if you don't come out, the perfect controller will also take action and move it out.

Therefore, it is necessary to stay in the Golden River of Extreme Creation long enough to raise the potential of the Controlling Body to a high enough level that there is hope of stepping into the Extreme Creation Realm in the future.

In the Ruins of Eternity, there were too few treasures that could help achieve the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm, and although the Extreme Creation Golden Liquid was only one of them, it was also the easiest treasure for a half-step perfect master like Ye Tian to obtain.

"Ye Tian, you must improve your strength as soon as possible, and the original No. 1 Youhe Master of the Blood Battle List who was kicked down by you came out of the Extreme Golden River, and in order to regain the first place in the Blood Battle List, he entered the Extreme Golden River again, and now he has ventured into the Misty Pupil Realm. "The Lord of Xuanhuang has revealed a piece of news.

"Misty Pupil Realm!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank.

The Misty Pupil Realm was a place he didn't dare to enter rashly at the moment, because it was indeed too dangerous.

The Misty Pupil Realm is also a strange realm where the eyes of the Misty Snake are connected, after entering, whether it is a half-step perfect will or a half-step perfectly controlled body, it will endure almost unimaginable suppression, and once it can't hold on, and if it doesn't come out in time, the will will will collapse directly.

It is rumored that even if the will doppelganger enters, once the will collapses, it will even affect the ontology.

There was once a half-step perfect controller who entered the misty pupil realm, and the will clone fell, and its body actually collapsed and died directly under the influence of a certain force, which shocked many half-step perfect controllers.

Ye Tian didn't know if he could bear it, after all, he hadn't gone in either.

But once he fails, his replica body will definitely collapse.

As for whether the replica body in the Daoless Tower would fall, he didn't know very well.

But what if the replica body also falls?

Of course, his own body in the Origin Realm Sea will definitely not die, but once all the bodies in the Eternal Realm will die, it will be troublesome, and he needs to re-dispatch the copy body to the Eternal Ruins, how much time will be wasted.

And, once he returns, how to explain that he is not dead?

Therefore, Ye Tian has never been to the Misty Pupil Realm, because he is so worried.

But he also knew very well that once he persevered in the Mist Pupil Realm, whether it was a half-step perfect will or a half-step control body, there would be a huge improvement in a short period of time.

This is also the reason why the master of the river entered the Misty Pupil Realm.

"Ye Tian, as the high-level of the Blood War Capital, I can't help you, I can only rely on yourself, in this thousand eternal years, you have to keep the first place no matter what. The Lord of Xuanhuang reminded.

"Thank you Lord Xuanhuang for the reminder!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Subsequently, the Lord of Xuanhuang left.

After all, he couldn't give Ye Tian any help, he could only reveal some news.

......

"The Hidden River Controller has entered the Misty Pupil Realm, if he is allowed to hold on for a long time, it is really possible to surpass me within a thousand eternal years!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But right now, his strength has reached a period of relaxation, even if he creates some top-notch perfect control skills and breaks some control chains, it will be useless, and he can't improve his strength too much.

In this period of respite, he needs to spend a long time slowly to improve his strength, until he has accumulated to a certain level, and only then can the half-step perfect control body and the half-step perfect control will be raised to the peak realm, and it will be enough to improve to the peak level of the half-step perfect controller combat power.

"In that case, I'll also enter the Misty Pupil Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

He didn't want the Ghost River Controller to take away his first place in the Blood Battle List, and he was bound to win the Extreme Gold Liquid.

As for the danger, he won't really die, so what else is there to fear?

A half-step perfect controller like the Youhe Controller is really at risk of falling, he dares to go in, why doesn't Ye Tian dare to go?

Thereupon.

Ye Tian's copy body went to the Misty Pupil Realm, and the will clone was still cultivating here.

......

"Ye Tian, this kid actually went to the Misty Pupil Realm, why was he so reckless? I just reminded him to practice hard and keep the first place as much as possible, and didn't let him go to the Misty Pupil Realm!"

As a high-level leader of the Blood War Capital, he can't interfere with the decisions of the members, if he stops it now, it will undoubtedly violate the rules, and other high-level leaders will definitely impeach him, which will bring some trouble to the Wudao Tower.

"I hope Ye Tian is okay!"

The Lord of Xuanhuang said expectantly.

The Serpent of the Mist, at the pupils.

Ye Tian came here and saw a pair of unimaginably huge pupils, like two huge void places.

This is the pair of pupils of the Misty Serpent, and it is also the only way to enter the Misty Pupil Realm.

If you want to enter the Misty Pupil Realm, you must ask for the permission of the Misty Serpent.

The Blood War Capital has an agreement with the Snake of the Mist, so as long as you apply to enter, the Snake of the Mist will send them in, but if you want to get out, you have to come out yourself, and the Snake of the Mist will not help you out when you are about to die.

"Lord Misty Serpent, I apply to enter the Mist Pupil Realm!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

Rumble!!!!

The eyes of the Misty Serpent glowed with a golden glow, which was a awakening of consciousness.

"Another little guy, there are a lot of little guys who have recently entered the Misty Pupil Realm, it's really troublesome, and it can't be a good night's sleep. "

"Let's go inside!"

The Misty Snake's eyes moved, turning into a passage, allowing Ye Tian to enter the Misty Pupil Realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian's body moved, entered the passage, and went to the Misty Pupil Realm.

And after Ye Tian entered, the Misty Snake muttered: "Strange, why does this little guy have a little familiar smell?" Forget it, don't think about it, continue to sleep, there shouldn't be a little guy coming!"

Instantly, the Misty Serpent's consciousness fell into a deep sleep.
